title: shepherdia × gottingensis
intro: Shepherdia × gottingensis, also known as Bigberry or Russet Buffaloberry, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Shepherdia argentea and Shepherdia canadensis. This shrub has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Shepherdia × gottingensis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
